name: Corner Illumination Uniformity Assessment
description:
Assess the illumination uniformity of a real VLT combined science image located at ~/AstroImages/uniformity_check/m12_Vcomb.fits. Using the coordinates for four 200x200 pixel corner regions (Top-Left, Top-Right, Bottom-Left, Bottom-Right) provided in ~/AstroImages/uniformity_check/roi_instructions.txt, measure the median and standard deviation for each region. Calculate the maximum fractional difference across the corners using the formula: max_diff_pct = 100 * (max_median - min_median) / mean_of_medians. Categorize the uniformity as "UNIFORM" (max_diff_pct < 5%), "MARGINAL" (5-10%), or "NON-UNIFORM" (> 10%). Save the findings to ~/AstroImages/uniformity_check/uniformity_report.txt using the format below and close the image when finished.

Corner TL: median=XXXX.X stddev=XXX.X
Corner TR: median=XXXX.X stddev=XXX.X
Corner BL: median=XXXX.X stddev=XXX.X
Corner BR: median=XXXX.X stddev=XXX.X
Max fractional difference: X.XX%
Assessment: [UNIFORM|MARGINAL|NON-UNIFORM]
